seoKeywords: structured bag charm with turn lock

summary.en: Italian-designed mini bag charms that clip onto your favourite handbag. Structured silhouettes, polished hardware, and a little Positano sunshine in every colorway.

seoHeading.en: Mini bag charms designed in Positano, Italy

seoBody.en: Caryina creates structured mini bag charms with turn-lock closures, textured finishes, and polished hardware. Each charm is designed in Positano and crafted to add personality to any handbag. Available in silver, rose splash, and peach colorways.

answer.en: Caryina is a micro-accessories brand designing mini bag charms in Positano, Italy. Each piece is a structured miniature handbag with real hardware, textured finishes, and its own personality.

question.en: What makes these different from other bag charms?

answer.en: Every Caryina charm is a proper little bag -- structured body, turn-lock closure, polished hardware. They're designed to look like a tiny version of your favourite handbag, not a keyring novelty.

answer.it: TODO: PLACEHOLDER — l'operatore deve inserire le dimensioni effettive per famiglia. Esempio: 'Il Top Handle è circa H 8 cm × L 6 cm × P 3 cm. Il Shoulder è leggermente più compatto. Il Mini è il nostro più piccolo, circa H 5 cm × L 4 cm × P 2 cm. Tutte le misure sono indicative.'

question.en: What bag does it clip onto?
question.de: An welcher Tasche befestigt man den Anhänger?

answer.en: TODO: PLACEHOLDER — describe attachment mechanism. Example: 'Each charm attaches via a lobster clasp. It clips onto a bag strap, D-ring, or handle in seconds — no tools needed. It fits most standard handbag hardware.'

Er lässt sich in Sekunden an einem Taschenriemen, D-Ring oder Griff befestigen — kein Werkzeug erforderlich. Er passt auf die meisten gängigen Taschenhalterungen.'
answer.it: TODO: PLACEHOLDER — descrivere il meccanismo di aggancio. Esempio: 'Ogni charm si aggancia tramite un moschettone. Si attacca a un cinturino, anello a D o manico in pochi secondi — senza strumenti. È compatibile con la maggior parte delle borse standard.'

question.en: How do I care for it?

answer.en: Wipe the body with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid prolonged exposure to water, direct sunlight, or heat. The hardware is polished — use a soft cloth to buff if needed. Do not submerge.
answer.de: Den Körper mit einem trockenen oder leicht feuchten Tuch abwischen. Längere Exposition gegenüber Wasser, direktem Sonnenlicht oder Hitze vermeiden. Die Beschläge sind poliert — bei Bedarf mit einem weichen Tuch aufpolieren. Nicht eintauchen.
answer.it: Pulire il corpo con un panno asciutto o leggermente inumidito. Evitare l'esposizione prolungata ad acqua, luce solare diretta o calore. La ferramenta è lucida — se necessario, lucidare con un panno morbido. Non immergere in acqua.

answer.en: No — do not machine wash, submerge, or steam clean. Wipe gently with a damp cloth if needed and allow to air dry.
answer.de: Nein — nicht in der Waschmaschine waschen, nicht eintauchen und nicht mit Dampf reinigen. Bei Bedarf vorsichtig mit einem feuchten Tuch abwischen und an der Luft trocknen lassen.
answer.it: No — non lavare in lavatrice, non immergere e non pulire a vapore. Se necessario, pulire delicatamente con un panno umido e lasciare asciugare all'aria.

question.en: When will out-of-stock items be restocked?
question.de: Wann werden nicht vorrätige Artikel wieder aufgefüllt?
question.it: Quando verranno riforniti gli articoli esauriti?

answer.en: Sign up for restock notifications using the 'Notify me' button on the product page. We will email you as soon as the item is available again. Restock timelines vary depending on production.
answer.de: Melden Sie sich mit dem Button 'Benachrichtigen' auf der Produktseite für Nachbestandsbenachrichtigungen an. Wir informieren Sie per E-Mail, sobald der Artikel wieder verfügbar ist. Die Wiederbeschaffungszeiten variieren je nach Produktion.
answer.it: Iscriviti alle notifiche di disponibilità tramite il pulsante 'Avvisami' sulla pagina del prodotto. Ti invieremo un'e-mail non appena l'articolo sarà di nuovo disponibile. I tempi di rifornimento variano in base alla produzione.

summary.en: Browse every colorway in the launch collection. Same structured silhouette, same polished hardware -- pick the finish that speaks to you.

trustBullets.en: Designed in Positano, Italy with polished hardware and textured finishes.
Eligible online orders normally include a 14-day cancellation right, and unused-item exchange requests may be handled within 30 days where stock allows.
Secure checkout with delivery timing shown before payment.

description.en: The classic carry. A structured silhouette with a curved top handle and turn-lock closure -- the charm that started it all.
Made to dangle. A compact profile with a shoulder-strap detail, designed to swing from your bag and catch the light.
Small but mighty. The most compact charm in the collection -- all the hardware and texture, scaled down to pocket size.

proofBullets.en: Structured silhouette, top-handle carry. A shaped body with side gussets holds its form — designed to hang from a bag strap, not fold into it.
Turn-lock hardware closure. A front strap with a turn-lock clasp closes the bag cleanly. Polished metal hardware on the strap keeper and clasp plate.
Designed in Positano, Italy. Manufactured to specification; designed in Italy. The Amalfi origin story is in the object, not just the packaging.
Textured finishes across colorways — metallic reptile emboss, croc emboss, pebbled grain. Selected colorways include a stitched building facade applique.
Eligible online orders normally include a 14-day cancellation right. Unused-item exchange requests may be handled within 30 days after delivery if replacement stock is available.

exchange.en: Unused-item exchange requests up to 30 days

summary.en: Need a hand? We help with orders, delivery questions, statutory cancellations, exchange requests, faulty-item claims, and privacy requests.

channels.en: Email us directly at hostelpositano@gmail.com and include your order number for faster support.
Use the Caryina support route for cancellation, delivery, exchange, faulty-item, and privacy requests.

summary.en: Caryina explains what personal data is used, why it is used, and the rights available to customers and website visitors.

bullets.en: Only required checkout and fulfillment data are collected.
Platform providers process payment and delivery data under their legal terms.
Your email address may be used to send a one-time notification about products you expressed interest in. You can withdraw consent at any time by contacting us.

notice.en: See the full Privacy Policy for complete details.

summary.en: Dispatch and delivery timing shown on the website or at checkout is estimated and may change because of carrier or customs handling.

bullets.en: Delivery timing is estimated and not guaranteed unless Caryina states otherwise in writing.
UK deliveries may involve import VAT, customs duties, or carrier handling charges unless checkout says they are included.

summary.en: Eligible online orders normally include a 14-day cancellation right, and Caryina may also accommodate unused-item exchanges requested within 30 days where stock allows.

bullets.en: 14-day statutory cancellation rights apply to eligible online consumer orders.
Unused-item exchange requests may be handled up to 30 days after delivery, subject to stock availability.

summary.en: By placing an order you agree to our sales terms and support policies.

bullets.en: Availability and delivery times may vary depending on stock.
Product photos and descriptions represent the items currently available.

summary.en: Caryina designs bag charms in Positano on the Amalfi Coast — small accessories that turn a simple bag into something personal.
summary.de: Caryina entwirft Taschenanhänger in Positano an der Amalfiküste — kleine Accessoires, die eine schlichte Tasche zu etwas Persönlichem machen.
summary.it: Caryina progetta ciondoli per borse a Positano, sulla Costiera Amalfitana — piccoli accessori che trasformano una borsa semplice in qualcosa di personale.

paragraphs.en: Caryina is a collection of bag charms designed in Positano on the Amalfi Coast. Each piece is created to turn a simple bag into something personal — a small detail that's entirely your own.
paragraphs.de: Caryina ist eine Kollektion von Taschenanhängern, die in Positano an der Amalfiküste entworfen wurden. Jedes Stück wurde geschaffen, um eine schlichte Tasche zu etwas Persönlichem zu machen — ein kleines Detail, das ganz dir gehört.
paragraphs.it: Caryina è una collezione di ciondoli per borse progettati a Positano, sulla Costiera Amalfitana. Ogni pezzo è stato creato per trasformare una borsa semplice in qualcosa di personale — un piccolo dettaglio che è interamente tuo.

paragraphs.en: We work with one carefully chosen supplier to bring our designs to life. Every hardware finish, material, and proportion is specified by us. Nothing reaches the collection that we wouldn't carry ourselves.
paragraphs.de: Wir arbeiten mit einem sorgfältig ausgewählten Lieferanten zusammen, um unsere Entwürfe zum Leben zu erwecken. Jede Hardwareoberfläche, jedes Material und jede Proportion wird von uns festgelegt. Nichts gelangt in die Kollektion, was wir nicht selbst tragen würden.
paragraphs.it: Lavoriamo con un unico fornitore scelto con cura per dare vita ai nostri design. Ogni finitura hardware, materiale e proporzione viene specificata da noi. Niente raggiunge la collezione che non porteremmo noi stessi.

paragraphs.en: Caryina is a brand of Skylar SRL, registered in Positano, Italy.
paragraphs.de: Caryina ist eine Marke der Skylar SRL mit Sitz in Positano, Italien.
paragraphs.it: Caryina è un marchio di Skylar SRL, registrata a Positano, Italia.
